title: 2024 Subaru Outback Review Australia
summary: In-depth Australian review of the 2024 Subaru Outback, including performance, technology, safety, ownership costs and used-car buying advice.
pros: Practical | Strong safety | Comfortable | Good value | Everyday usability
cons: Top grades cost more | Inspect used examples carefully | Some rivals excel in specific areas
content:
The 2024 Subaru Outback is designed to meet the needs of Australian drivers looking for a practical, dependable vehicle. This review explores styling, cabin quality, infotainment, engine performance, ride comfort, handling, fuel economy or energy efficiency, safety technology, reliability, servicing, resale value and ownership costs. Before buying a used example, verify the service history, obtain a PPSR report, inspect the VIN, test all electronics, check tyres and brakes, and arrange an independent mechanical inspection. Comparing several vehicles in the market helps ensure you pay a fair price and choose the example in the best condition.
